snippet.description:

Premijera spota i pjesme "INAMORANA" - Tonči Huljić & Madre Badessa feat. Petar Grašo.

Tekst: Vjekoslava Huljić
Aranžman: Tonči Huljić, Eduard Botrić, Dušan Vasić

Download:
Apple Music - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-AppleMusic
Amazon - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Amazon

Listen:
Spotify - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Spotify
Deezer - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Deezer
Tidal - http://bit.ly/InamoranaSingle-Tidal

Video: PILOT studio
Kamera: Bruno Bilonić
Montaža: Notengos
Šminka: Ana Favro
Glumice: Jasna Malec Utrobičić, Petra Kapor

Zahvaljujemo: Hotel Slavija, Duje Bonačić

© Tonci Huljic & Madre Badessa - Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimke i postavljanje na druge kanale!

#TonciHuljic #Inamorana #PetarGraso #MadreBadessa

Inamorana,
uvik je dobro vrime
nekom svome doć...
Inamorana,
ja srce svoje po tvon
štiman dan i noć...
Inamorana,
profumi mažurana
prolaze kraj nas...
Inamorana,
kad judi vole
šutnja najjači je glas...

Di bi ti, di bi ti,
tu bi ja...
Di si ti, di si ti,
tu san ja...
Da  proveden tri života
sa tobon u četri oka,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Malo bi, malo bi bilo...
Da ti stoput kažen fala
za sve ono šta si dala,
malo bi, malo bi bilo...

inamorana – zaljubljena
profumi - mirisi

snippet.title: DORIS DRAGOVIC - SNA'CU SE JA (OFFICIAL VIDEO 2021) HD
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Tonika Records: http://bit.ly/1UuxJ1B

Glazba: Ivan Huljić
Tekst: Vjekoslava Huljić
Aranžman i mix: Leo Škaro

Download:
Apple Music - http://bit.ly/SnacuSeJa-AppleMusic
Amazon - http://bit.ly/SnacuSeJa-Amazon

Listen:
Deezer - http://bit.ly/SnacuSeJa-Deezer
Tidal - http://bit.ly/SnacuSeJa-Tidal

©Tonika – Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimke i  postavljanje na druge kanale

Video: PILOT studio
Kamera: Bruno Bilonić
Montaža: Notengos
Šminka: Tončica Baković
Bubnjar u videu: Luka Šoić

Doris Dragović – Sna'ću se ja

Skidan sve sa srca
šta mu ne triba,
ko je lud pa bi prid neba sud
izmaćane duše...

Ne viruje mi se
drugin judima,
iman ja svoju viru i miru
od jubavi...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

Sna'ću se ja
i slidit svoj put,
i da razbije me grom
iden tebi di je dom...

Ja samo znan
da smo zemlja i cvit,
di jubav stanuje,
niko neće ostarit...

Doris Dragović – Sna'ću se ja

Skidan sve sa srca
šta mu ne triba,
ko je lud pa bi prid neba sud
izmaćane duše...

Ne viruje mi se
drugin judima,
iman ja svoju viru i miru
od jubavi...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

Sna'ću se ja
i slidit svoj put,
i da razbije me grom
iden tebi di je dom...

Ja samo znan
da smo zemlja i cvit,
di jubav stanuje,
niko neće ostarit...

Šta je to za mene
dignit prašinu,
uvik je boje gurat vitar
nego tišinu...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

snippet.title: Shakedown LIVE - WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Don´t miss WRC round 3 LIVE on wrcplus.com 22 - 25 April 🇭🇷 

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/esports-wrc/

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_confirmation=1

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter Röhrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott Tänak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi Mäkinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Grönholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with Sébastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion Sébastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi Räikkönen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam

ooo ooo

snippet.title: Ovakvog ministra Marića još niste vidjeli: "Dobro je da nema kamera..."
snippet.description:
Pretplatite se na @Index Video za više ovakvog sadržaja. 

"Dobro je da nema kamera, ne moramo se suzdržavati", rekao je ministar financija Zdravko Marić na Odboru za zdravstvo. Problem je što je ipak bilo kamera i što su one uživo prenosile sjednicu odbora preko Youtubea, a ministar se doista nije suzdržavao.

snippet.title: I Spent 50 Hours Locked In An Art Store
snippet.description:
This was insane
We were locked in an art store for 50 hours
Instant Influencer Announcement On @ZHC Crafts 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nQx2jYrsVDc

Subscribe right now and you might get picked to win cash, custom apple products, custom cars, and even custom houses!

New merch coming soon: https://zhcstore.com/

If this video gets 1,000,000 likes we'll give away a house


Follow my socials! 
Instagram - @ zhc
Twitter - @ zhc_yt


To apply to be on “Instant Influencer with ZHC,” submit your self-taped YouTube video in our casting portal here.
Tag your videos under the hashtag castmeZHC on YouTube to show the world you've got what it takes.
Uploaders must ensure their videos comply with the YouTube Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.
Uploaders must be over the age of 18 and must live in the United States. Sorry I wasn't able to make it international this time.
Uploaders must have at least 6 uploads in the last 3 months on their YouTube channel.
Uploaders that demonstrate strong expertise in the art space and a passion for educating and inspiring others will be considered for participation in the show.

snippet.title: ĐOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvršni producent: Đ. ĐOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎧 BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082
Spotify  --- https://open.spotify.com/album/1WBQiJwSCkQejkNysoGnfU 
Tidal --- https://store.tidal.com/rs/album/179745531
Amazon --- https://www.amazon.com/Lock-Down-Explicit-Đogani/dp/B091V6715V/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=lockdown+đogani&qid=1618212461&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
ITunes --- https://music.apple.com/us/album/lock-down-single/1561828922
Napster  --- coming soon
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ĐOGANI: 

📲  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
📩 djogani.djole@gmail.com

👉 Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/​ 

👉 Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupa​ 
👉 Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesna​ 

Subscribe to Channel Đogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupaĐOGANIofficial
Uključi 🔔 da dobijaš obaveštenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kući cele noći maskiran
Svetom vlada čudna epidemija
Čekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piše LOCK DOWN,
Vidiš na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci čini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru čekamo
Da me grliš hoću jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Slušaj malo doktore na vestima
Šta će dalje biti baš me zanima
Čekaj, hani, hani, da prođu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Još samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reč
Puničemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beč.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je Đole Đogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je što smo sami,
Ne možemo vani
Zato dođi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaš mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
🎵 Antonu
🎵 Marku D.
🎵 Žiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZABRANJENO je reupload-ovati na svoj lični kanal zbog kršenja autorskih prava i kvarenja zvuka i nepotrebnog gomilanja na YouTube-u! Svako kačenje Video spota na YouTube, biće prijavljeno YouTube administratorima. Sva autorska i izvođačka prava su zaštićena.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
©️ ONAIR MEDIA GROUP
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Kosor i Čanak: Hrvatska i Srbija su protiv raspada BiH
snippet.description:
Bivša premijerka Hrvatske i nekadašnja predsjednica HDZ-a Jadranka Kosor i lider Lige socijaldemokarata Vojvodine Nenad Čanak bili su gosti Pressinga. Oboje su se složili da Hrvatska i Srbija ne bi podržale raspad Bosne i Hercegovine. Čanak je dodao da ni vlast u entitetu Republika Srpska nema stvarnu želju da se pripoji Srbiji.

snippet.title: DOBRO JUTRO KOMŠIJA (SEZONA 3) - EPIZODA 7
snippet.description:

Sve epizode treće sezone serije: https://bit.ly/3t1AKv1​

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George’s Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aranžman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic​​

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.description:
Диана је то учинила! Кошаркаш се вратио у школу. Али постоји један проблем, брат близанац кошаркаша такође жели да студира у овој школи! И он је већ успео да задовољи девојкама навијачице. Али кошаркаш ово неће дозволити! Како се вратио кошаркаш? Шта ће брат близанац радити у школи? Погледајте у овој серији!

Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦

Lyrics

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

I won’t love a hoe after we fuck she can’t get near me
Only bitch I give a conversation to is Siri
My pants Amiri
Yes I’m winning clearly
I’m the chosen one see my potential so they fear me
Lately I’ve been praying God I wonder can you hear me
Thinking about the old me I swear I miss you dearly
Stay down until you come up I’ve been sticking to that theory
Every day a battle I’m exhausted and I’m weary
Make sure I smile in public when alone my eyes teary
I fought through it all but that shit hurt me severely 
I’ve been getting high to hide behind my insecurities
Taking different pills but I know it ain’t no 

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished

They say I’m Pac rebirth
Never put out a weak verse
Homicides when we lurk
Imma step ‘til my feet hurt
Been putting them streets first
White tee turned burgundy tee shirts
Looking for something real, he stuck in a deep search
Anxiety killing me I just wanna leave Earth
When they ask if I’m okay it just make everything seem worse
Trying to explain your feelings sound like something you rehearse 
Stab me in my back with a clean smirk

Looking so deep into your eyes I can read your thoughts
Shut the fuck- I mean please don’t talk
I’ve done been through too much and I don’t need another loss
Put that on every war scar for every battle that I’ve fought

Copped a BMW
New deposit I picked up another bag like fuck it imma count while I’m in it
I hear planes flying crowds screaming money counting chains clinging shit I guess that’s how it sound when you winning
I ain’t joking do it sound like I’m kidding
I been making like two thousand a minute
So high up through the clouds I was swimming
I’m probably gon’ drown when I’m in it
I bet she gon’ get loud when I’m in it
And we might have a child when I’m finished
When I’m finished, when I’m finished

snippet.title: Кошаркаш је отишао у другу школу! | Дајана је упознала близанку кошаркаша!
snippet.description:
Одједном је кошаркаш напустио школу, а Диана не зна шта се догодило. После школе, Диана је одлучила да ће отићи до кошаркашевог дома како би све сазнала. Али нисам морао нигде да идем, јер је кошаркашев брат близанац дошао у школу и све рекао Дијани! Шта се десило? Да ли кошаркаш има брата близанца? Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео: https://youtu.be/m1FFe2UPgT8
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

hr.title: Košarkaš je otišao u drugu školu! | Diana je upoznala košarkašku blizanku!
hr.description:
Odjednom je košarkaš napustio školu, a Diana ne zna što se dogodilo. Nakon škole, Diana je odlučila otići do košarkaškog doma kako bi sve saznala. Ali nisam morao nikamo ići, jer je košarkašev brat blizanac došao u školu i sve rekao Dijani! Što se dogodilo? Ima li košarkaš brata blizanca? Pogledajte ovu seriju!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Ne zaboravite na zvono! 🔔🔔🔔
Hvala na vašim lajkovima! ❤️❤️❤️

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Комплекси Навијачице | Ко ће ићи на Дианину забаву!? | Диана Схов
snippet.description:
Диана и она навијања тим су веома узнемирени јер мисле да имају много комплекса. Да бисте проверили ко зна комплекса за девојчице, они одржати такмичење за најбољи цртеж навијачице, и ко ће освојити ће ићи на забаву у кући Дајане. Ко ће победити на такмичењу у цртању? Ко ће ићи на Дианину забаву? Погледајте у овом видеу!
Још један видео: https://youtu.be/HWl76Lnbyfg

Tko će pobijediti na natječaju za crtanje? Tko će ići na Dianinu zabavu? Pogledajte ovaj video!

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

en-GB.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
en-GB.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare: 
https://skl.sh/kurzgesagtinanutshell05211

Sources & further reading:
https://sites.google.com/view/sourcesclimatenuclear/

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? More and more voices from science, environmental activists and the press have been saying so in recent years – but this comes as a shock to those who are fighting against nuclear energy and the problems that come with it. So who is right? Well - it is complicated.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode možete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priče o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priča o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaša čiji postupci se i dan danas prepričavaju. Na čelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih žestokih momaka sa naših prostora, začetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir Magaš, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravičan, patriota pomalo preke naravi rešavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anđeo čuvar dok je za ove druge bio noćna mora, a gnev i jačinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlično pamtili. Životni put Ljubomira Magaša i družine koju je okupio oko sebe, može se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbrižnih dečaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovčega. Saznaćemo na koje sve skrivene i javne načine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih događaja iz njegovog života. Čućemo i svedočanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentarističkih akcionih filmova.
